name: Zhong Kui
description: Zhong Kui, also known as the Demon Queller, is a prominent figure in Chinese mythology, revered as a vanquisher of evil spirits and ghosts. Legend states that Zhong Kui was a brilliant scholar who, despite excelling in the imperial examinations, was denied his rightful position due to his unsightly appearance. Overcome with despair and injustice, he committed suicide by throwing himself against the palace gates. The Jade Emperor, moved by his tragic fate and recognizing his inherent righteousness, appointed Zhong Kui as the King of Ghosts, tasking him with hunting down and subduing demons. He is often depicted as a fierce-looking figure with a dark complexion, large eyes, and a thick beard, wielding a sword and surrounded by demons he has captured. Zhong Kui is invoked during times of illness, misfortune, or when protection from malevolent spirits is needed. His image is frequently displayed during the Ghost Festival and at Lunar New Year to ward off evil and bring good fortune. He is considered a symbol of justice, righteousness, and the triumph of good over evil, ensuring peace and prosperity for households and communities. Zhong Kui's influence extends beyond mere exorcism; he represents the power of integrity and unwavering commitment to battling injustice, even in the face of personal tragedy.
subtitle: The Demon Queller, Vanquisher of Evil

keyMyths.title: The Scholar's Suicide
keyMyths.description: Zhong Kui, denied his rightful position due to his appearance, committed suicide in protest. The Jade Emperor then appointed him King of Ghosts.

keyMyths.title: Zhong Kui's Demon Hunt
keyMyths.description: As King of Ghosts, Zhong Kui leads his demon army to capture and subdue evil spirits, restoring balance to the world. He is a relentless hunter of malevolent entities.

keyMyths.title: The Gift of the Sister
keyMyths.description: After Zhong Kui's death, his sister ensured he received a proper burial. In return, he protected her and her family from harm.

sources.author: Werner, E.T.C.
sources.description: A comprehensive collection of Chinese myths and legends.
sources.text: A comprehensive collection of Chinese myths and legends.
